backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two pending features to remove Toyota Crysta and Urbania vehicles from FleetShowcase.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend component files describing their purpose and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color scheme variables for light and dark modes, defining design tokens for the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component composing Header, Hero, FleetShowcase, ServicesSection, PricingSection, CallToAction, and Footer in a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/CallToAction.tsx: Call-to-action section with phone and WhatsApp contact buttons encouraging users to book rides.
frontend/src/components/FleetShowcase.ts: Fleet showcase displaying three vehicles (Dzire, Kia Carens, Etios) with images, categories, and passenger capacity in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with business information, contact details, services list, social media links, and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header displaying logo, business name, and call button with phone number 9878784024.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with gradient background, headline, service description, and primary call-to-action buttons.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Pricing display showing per-kilometer rates, daily rentals, and city-specific route prices for Chandigarh, Jalandhar, and Ludhiana.
React component displaying a 'Why Choose Us' section with four service cards (Professional Drivers, Safe & Reliable, 24/7 Availability, Best Service) and a highlighted message about hardworking drivers with good behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for React Query hooks that interact with the backend; currently exports useBackendQueries which only wraps useActor since no backend methods are implemented yet.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a cool blue-teal color scheme for both light and dark modes, including colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking a travel/car rental business app with existing features for fleet showcase, contact display, services section, pricing information, and cool color scheme implementation; includes architectural notes and feature request tracking.
